prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: shop UI component pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sheet of reusable shop UI components.
Subject: offer card frame, selected frame, disabled/unaffordable frame, sold-out overlay badge shape, relic slot frame, reroll button frame, treasure chest choice card frame, small transaction status badge.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome for mobile readability.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet with clean spacing and padding; components only.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta background #FF00FF only.
Color palette: dark stone, warm gold, muted teal, silver accents, restrained red for disabled states, but no magenta key color.
Constraints: one exact flat #FF00FF background; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows or glow touching background; no particles; no extra frame/panel/matte backdrop except the actual UI components themselves; no text; no watermark.
Avoid: no #FF00FF or near-magenta tones inside any UI component artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
